SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2018 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 06/28/18 REMAINS THE SAME, WITH $50.00 IN COST FOR A NEW TOTAL OF $2650.00. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT AU, JIMMY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ROBLES, LUIS ALBERTO $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
